title: Obstruction Efficiency PASS: class 6 (forbidden) — 47 nodes saved, pruning_ratio=1.0
_fixture_purpose: Efficiency certificate for a forbidden target. Baseline naive planner expands 47 nodes before exhausting the search bound without finding a plan (class 6 is arithmetically impossible — no plan can exist). Obstruction-aware planner checks v_3(6)=1, prunes immediately, expands 0 nodes. Saved: 47 nodes, pruning_ratio=1.0. This is the maximum possible savings (100% of search cost eliminated). The efficiency is not incidental — it follows from the arithmetic structure: any number of baseline nodes would be wasted since no plan for class 6 can exist. The cert reuses the same traces as the [113] FAIL fixture, reframing the obstruction-not-applied failure as a quantified efficiency loss.

baseline_trace.notes: Naive planner: no arithmetic pre-check. Expanded 47 nodes, exhausted search depth without finding a plan. Failure is structural — class 6 is arithmetically impossible — but the naive planner discovers this only through exhaustion.

aware_trace.notes: Obstruction-aware planner: v_3(6)=1 detected before any expansion. Prune applied immediately. Zero search work done.

efficiency_claim.notes: 100% of search cost eliminated. The savings are guaranteed — not probabilistic — because v_3(6)=1 is a structural fact about Z[phi]/9Z[phi], not a heuristic estimate.

validation_checks.description: false_pruning=false (target is forbidden, pruning is correct)
validation_checks.details: false_pruning=false; target is genuinely forbidden; no false pruning
